name: module-tree-map
question: What is the hierarchical synopsis tree of this project's modules? (HCT triage map)

schema.briefing: string (one-liner for ORACLE BRIEFING display per HCT-05; empty when total_modules == 0 -> gracefully absent)

fallback: Use Glob to enumerate README.md files, then Read each to extract Synopsis sections — but you will pay full README ingestion cost across the breadth-first candidate set, which is exactly the cost HCT exists to eliminate.
